strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience with diverse tech stack (TypeScript, D, Java, etc.)
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq
Entrepreneurial background from GISCollective and other ventures demonstrating initiative
concerns: No explicit AI/ML specialization or recognized expertise in AI (e.g., no PhD, research publications, or AI-specific products)
No clear evidence of cloud platform strategy or cloud-native AI product development
No evidence of advising strategic customers on AI technologies or disrupting cloud/AI markets

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and strategic product impact
Cloud and AI platform strategy experience

response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum 15-year experience requirement but lacks core AI expertise (no PhD, AI-specific products, or recognized authority in AI). While they contribute to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, this is not sufficient for a Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy. Their entrepreneurial experience is valuable but not directly aligned with cloud/AI platform strategy. No evidence of advising strategic customers on AI technologies or defining future cloud products.
